0.name: Seal (1 person)
0.desc: Seals up a single member from the opposing party.

1.name: Darkness (Party)
1.desc: Puts everyone in the opposing party in a state of darkness at an 80% success rate.

2.name: Weakness(Party)
2.desc: Puts everyone in the opposing party in a state of weakness at an 80% success rate.

3.name: Stun (1 person)
3.desc: Stuns a single member from the opposing party.

4.name: Curse (Party)
4.desc: Curses everyone in the opposing party.

5.name: Poisoned (Party)
5.desc: Poisons everyone in the opposing party at an 80% success rate.

6.name: Slow (Party)
6.desc: Slows down everyone in the opposing party at an 80% success rate.

7.name: Cancel Buff (1 person)
7.desc: Cancels the buff of a single member of the opposing party.

0.name: Power UP
0.desc: The Weapon Attack stats for the monster working for your party has increased by 50.

1.name: Guard UP
1.desc: The Weapon Defense stats for the monster working for your party has increased by 50.

2.name: Magic UP
2.desc: The Magic Attack stats for the monster working for your party has increased by 40.

3.name: Shield UP
3.desc: The Magic Defense stats for the monster working for your party has increased by 50.

4.name: Accuracy UP
4.desc: The Accuracy stats for the monster working for your party has increased by 30.

5.name: Avoidability UP
5.desc: The Avoidability stats for the monster working for your party has increased by 30.

6.name: Speed UP
6.desc: The Speed stats for the monster working for your party has increased by 30.

7.name: Cancel Weapon Attack
7.desc: The monster working for your party is now immune to weapon attack.

8.name: Cancel Magic Attack
8.desc: The monster working for your party is now immune to magic attack.
